tree.name: Ajay Mitchell
tree.tradeDescription: Acquired from New York Knicks for Oso Ighodaro and cash
tree.note: UC Santa Barbara product, drafted 38th overall by NYK in 2024. Three rapid-fire draft night trades: Waters→Post→Ighodaro→Mitchell.

assetsGivenUp.name: Oso Ighodaro
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Portland (who drafted him #40 using ATL's pick) for Quinten Post and cash
assetsGivenUp.note: Marquette center, drafted by POR with ATL's pick. Immediately flipped to OKC then to NYK.

assetsGivenUp.name: Quinten Post
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Golden State (who drafted him #52) for Lindy Waters III
assetsGivenUp.note: Dutch center, drafted by GSW. Immediately flipped to POR for Ighodaro.

assetsGivenUp.name: Lindy Waters III
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed by OKC as undrafted free agent via Oklahoma City Blue (G-League). Traded to GSW (Jun 27, 2024) for Quinten Post (#52).
assetsGivenUp.note: Oklahoma native, OK State product. Undrafted 2020, signed via G-League pipeline. TRUE ORIGIN.
